series_metadata.series_description: Original hard copy prescription or facsimile thereof (except C-II) issued by practitioner for patient/client on traditional prescription blanks/Doctors Orders. Records the date of dispensing and dispensing pharmacist's manually written initials (required by law even if computer system maintain dispensing records)

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 3 years, then destroy. NOTE: Dispensing records maintained via an automated data processing system must be readily retrievable (CRT display or hard copy printout) within 3 working days, excluding holidays or weekends ; Electronic: Retain 3 years, then destroy. NOTE: Dispensing records maintained via an automated data processing system must be readily retrievable (CRT display or hard copy printout) within 3 working days, excluding holidays or weekends, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
